name: role
content: import groovy.json.JsonSlurper; parsed_args = new JsonSlurper().parseText(args); import org.sonatype.nexus.security.SecuritySystem; security.addRole(parsed_args.roleadgroup, parsed_args.roleadgroup, '', ['nx-repository-view-docker-docker-hub-*','nx-repository-view-docker-docker-' + parsed_args.rolecustomer + '-group-*','nx-repository-view-docker-docker-' + parsed_args.rolecustomer + '-hosted-*'], [])
